definitions.text: Having much distance in space from one end to the other.
examples: I need a long piece of wood.
It’s a long way from the Earth to the Moon.

definitions.text: Specifically, having much distance in a horizontal dimension (see also Usage Notes below).
examples: This table is long but not very high.

definitions.text: A note formerly used in music, one half the length of a large, twice that of a breve.
To take a long position in.
Over a great distance in space.
examples: Every golfer wants to hit the ball long and straight.
She hit her return long and lost the point.

definitions.text: Over too great a distance, beyond the target.
examples: She hit her return long and lost the point.
How long is it until the next bus arrives?
She has known us as long as you.

definitions.text: To await, aspire, desire greatly (something to occur or to be true).
examples: She longed for him to come back.

definitions.text: To be appropriate to, to pertain or belong to.
